phases.title: publish-git-ranker-submodule-baseline
phases.goal: Reflect the already-completed git-ranker backend baseline in this workflow PR by updating the git-ranker gitlink and restoring review readiness.
starting_points: Confirm the follow-up spec now includes the git-ranker gitlink requirement.
Verify the checked-out git-ranker submodule HEAD matches the backend commit that should be published with this PR.
Only update the workflow repo gitlink; do not edit backend source inside the workflow repository.
deliverables: The workflow PR branch points git-ranker at backend commit fbc672c6384eb896183f838be7413e195e388dc5.
The task returns to review_ready with updated evidence.
phases.completion_signal: The git-ranker gitlink points at fbc672c6384eb896183f838be7413e195e388dc5 and doctor still passes.

commands: python3 -c "import subprocess; diff=subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--submodule=short','--','git-ranker'], text=True); assert 'fbc672c6384eb896183f838be7413e195e388dc5' in diff, diff; print(diff.strip())"
python3 -c "import subprocess; sha=subprocess.check_output(['git','-C','git-ranker','rev-parse','HEAD'], text=True).strip(); assert sha == 'fbc672c6384eb896183f838be7413e195e388dc5', sha; print(sha)"

evidence: No new workflow runtime or backend source code is introduced in this follow-up; the change only publishes the already-completed git-ranker baseline through the workflow repo gitlink.
The workflow runtime changes remain covered by the previously passed verification run 20260416T081911-d8020d25.
The backend target commit fbc672c6384eb896183f838be7413e195e388dc5 already corresponds to git-ranker PR #89.
